data.title: Fork navapbc/template-application-nextjs and pre-bake DSO infrastructure files in template repo
data.description:
testing_mode: GREEN

Set up the DSO template fork that the installer clones. This is a repository scaffolding task — changes happen in the template repo, not in this plugin repo.

Requirements from story done definition:
1. Create public GitHub repo under DSO org, forked from navapbc/template-application-nextjs
2. Add DSO infrastructure files to template repo:
   - project-understanding.md (project root)
   - design-notes.md (project root)
   - .claude/ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md (must be at .claude/ path, not bare docs/)
   - dso-config.conf (project root; dso.plugin_root field empty or commented out — installer writes actual value)
   - CLAUDE.md (project root)
   - .pre-commit-config.yaml (project root)
   - .github/workflows/ci.yml (GitHub Actions)
3. Pre-create tickets orphan branch with empty initial commit (accessible via git clone --no-single-branch or git fetch origin tickets)
4. Verify license: navapbc/template-application-nextjs must permit forking/redistribution
5. settings.json: omit (per S1 spike failure path finding — installer cannot reliably write settings.json pre-launch)

TDD exemption: GREEN — scaffolding task creating external repo structure. No executable assertions possible on external repo state from this codebase. Exemption criterion: scaffolding task (no behavioral contract assertable in this repo's test suite).

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: gh repo view dso-org/template-application-nextjs --json name,visibility | grep -q 'public' (or manual confirmation that repo exists and is public)
- Verify: Template repo contains all required DSO infrastructure files at correct paths
- Verify: git ls-remote <template-repo-url> tickets (orphan branch accessible)
